Notice Of Motion And Motion For 1 Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative 2 Evidentiary Sanctions And Additional Monetary Sanctions Of 1320 00 Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AC HOTEL BY MARRIOTT SAN FRANCISCO AIRPORT OYSTER, ROHIT CHAND, OYSTER POINT HOTELS, LLC'S Motion For 1) Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative 2) Evidentiary Sanctions And Additional Monetary Sanctions Of 1320 00 Against Plaintiff.

Transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar in room 301 on the same date at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Defendants Ac Hotel By Marriott San Francisco Airport Oyster, Rohit Chand, Oyster Point Hotels, Llc'S Motion For 1 Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative 2 Evidentiary Sanctions And Additional Monetary Sanctions Of 1320 00 Against Plaintiff (Transferred From Law & Motion By Pb)
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Zachary A. Price of Freeman Mathis & Gary LLP 415-627-9000 appeared for Defendant Ac Hotel. / No other appearances.

Hearing Held, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Ac Hotel By Marriott San Francisco Airport Oyster, Rohit Chand, Oyster Point Hotels, Llc'S Motion For 1 Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative 2 Evidentiary Sanctions And Additional Monetary Sanctions Of 1320 00 Against Plaintiff. The motion for terminating sanctions is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Plaintiff has failed to comply with court orders to attend deposition and respond to discovery requests. The case is dismissed in its entirety against all Defendants, with prejudice. (Cal. Code Civ. Proc. section 2030.030(d)(3).) Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Noah Lebowitz, Clerk K.Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Text Ruling

Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $720
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Zachary A. Price, Esq, Freeeman Mathis & Gary, 415-3526451, appearing for Defendant(s) AC Hotek by Marriott et al;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AC HOTEL BY MARRIOTT SAN FRANCISCO AIRPORT OYSTER, ROHIT CHAND, OYSTER POINT HOTELS, LLC Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $720

No opposition having been filed, and the Motion and supporting Declaration having established that Plaintiff failed to appear at a duly noticed deposition, the Motion is granted and Plaintiff is ordered to appear for his deposition on December 27, 2019 in the office of Defendants' counsel at 44 Montgomery Street, Suite 3580, San Francisco at a time to be designated by Defendants' counsel and included in the text of the proposed order to be submitted to the Court. Defendants' request for $720 in monetary sanctions against Plaintiff is granted and $720 in sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff and are due and payable to Defendants' counsel within 10 days of the date of the signed order. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
